info.name: EverCut - Barber Earnings & Ratings
info.description: Earnings tracking and rating management for barber shops

request.description:
Add a reply to a customer rating.

Required Fields:
- replyText: Reply text (max 500 characters)

Business Rules:
- Only shop owner can reply to ratings on their shop
- One reply per rating (use update to modify existing reply)

Response:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Reply added successfully",
  "data": {
    "ratingId": "...",
    "rating": 5,
    "review": "Great service!",
    "user": {...},
    "reply": {
      "text": "Thank you for your feedback!",
      "repliedAt": "2024-03-15T10:30:00.000Z"
    },
    "createdAt": "2024-03-15T10:00:00.000Z"
  }
}

Update an existing reply to a customer rating.

Required Fields:
- replyText: Updated reply text (max 500 characters)

Business Rules:
- Only shop owner can update replies on their shop
- Reply must already exist

Response:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Reply updated successfully",
  "data": {...}
}

Delete a reply from a customer rating.

Business Rules:
- Only shop owner can delete replies on their shop
- Reply must exist

Response:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Reply deleted successfully"
}
Remove a rating from the shop (barber can remove inappropriate ratings).
